title: WIP: DO NOT MERGE: PRE-F35 TESTING
body:
This is a test PR to provide confidence that none of the pre-F35 update changes/fixes affect testing: https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/98

In this way, the F35 image update results can be understood in better isolation:
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11795
